summary: Completed e2e testing of iteration 6 features: task auto-assignment, authenticated owner storage, runtime remote-management, and chat fallback with commercial approval. All 35 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for RuntimesPage (remote-management notices) and ChatPage (approval modal structure).

minor.issue: Returns 403 for non-admin users (expected behavior, but some tests initially failed due to auth scope)

issues: Frontend proxy was configured for port 8000 but backend runs on 8001 - fixed during testing

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend package.json proxy was set to port 8000 but backend runs on 8001 - fixed by updating proxy to http://localhost:8001
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded admin and agents
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified: (1) POST /api/tasks/ auto-assigns agents when agent_id omitted - working, (2) Task creation stores authenticated owner instead of 'unknown' - working, (3) POST /runtimes/{id}/start and /runtimes/stop-all return informational payloads in remote environments - working, (4) RuntimesPage shows remote-management notices without errors - working, (5) Chat fallback with approval_required field accepted by ChatMessage model - working, (6) ChatPage has CommercialApprovalModal component ready for approval flow - verified in code. Frontend proxy port was fixed from 8000 to 8001.

features_verified.task_auto_assignment: PASS - Tasks without agent_id get auto-assigned to available agents based on task_type matching
features_verified.authenticated_owner_storage: PASS - Task owner_id is set to authenticated user ID, not 'unknown'
features_verified.runtime_remote_management: PASS - /runtimes/{id}/start and /runtimes/stop-all return 200 with informational payloads (remote_managed or docker_unavailable)
features_verified.runtimes_page_ui: PASS - Shows banner 'This environment cannot control Docker directly. Manage remote runtimes on their host, then refresh health here.'
features_verified.chat_approval_field: PASS - ChatMessage model accepts allow_commercial_fallback_once field without validation errors
features_verified.chat_page_ui: PASS - Shows Auto/Manual mode toggle, Agent ON badge, and chat input/send functionality
